name: SP4096 + Polar Express NS + MuonEq-R + WD=0.090
blurb: On clarkkev PR #1218 SP4096 base: Polar Express NS (4 steps, arXiv:2505.16932), MuonEq-R row-norm, WD=0.090 for quantization-friendly compression, XSA all 11 layers. 3-seed mean 1.0959 (1337=1.0961, 42=1.0959, 2025=1.0956).
author: Omri Gotlieb
